title: stenaria mullerae subsp. pooleana
intro: Stenaria mullerae subsp. pooleana, also known as Poole's stenaria, is a perennial plant species native to the southeastern United States. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, alleviating respiratory issues, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Stenaria mullerae subsp. pooleana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
